name: EdwBEKeyRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_getRecords AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='BEKEY' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE p SET p.EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC p JOIN cte_getRecords c ON c.SRC_SYS_CD=p.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.TRGT_SYS_CD=p.TRGT_SYS_CD AND c.SUBJ_CD=p.SUBJ_CD WHERE p.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.RUN_CYC_NO AND p.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
IdsEdwBEKeyRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
